name: Google MCP Toolbox
description: Official Google MCP server for 30+ databases — BigQuery, Postgres, AlloyDB, Spanner, MySQL, Redis, Neo4j. YAML-configured, enterprise-grade database access for agents.

skills.name: Multi-Database Query
skills.description: Execute queries across BigQuery, Postgres, AlloyDB, Spanner, MySQL, Redis, and Neo4j from any MCP client.

skills.name: Tool Configuration
skills.description: Define database tools via YAML — parameterized queries, connection pools, auth — without writing server code.

skills.name: Cloud-Native Auth
skills.description: Authenticate to Google Cloud databases using Application Default Credentials with zero manual token management.
